text.title: Scope Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping scope state to a rule.

branch.when: out_of_scope_empty == false AND ac_testable_all == true AND baseline_signed == false

conclusion.verdict: block downstream WBS; obtain sponsor signature first

branch.when: out_of_scope_empty == false AND ac_testable_all == true AND baseline_signed == true AND rtm_orphans > 0
out_of_scope_empty == false AND ac_testable_all == true AND baseline_signed == true AND rtm_orphans == 0 AND absorbed_changes > 0

conclusion.verdict: recover unrecorded changes via retroactive CC

branch.when: out_of_scope_empty == false AND ac_testable_all == true AND baseline_signed == true AND rtm_orphans == 0 AND absorbed_changes == 0

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: out_of_scope_empty=false, ac_testable_all=true, baseline_signed=true, rtm_orphans=0, absorbed_changes=0 → accept scope.
